/usr/bin/clang++ -O2 -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Wl,-undefined,dynamic_lookup -Wl,-multiply_defined,suppress -Wl,-flat_namespace -o Balloon.bundle CMakeFiles/Balloon.dir/CMakeFiles/Balloon.dir/BalloonRUBY_wrap.cxx.o   -L/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/syn/ANLNext/balloon/build -lANLNext ../libProjectXBalloon.dylib -lANLNext -lmongocxx -lbsoncxx
